step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/92763235-bce4-4ef8-aaf3-35e40030b234.zip (2.92 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 860
PreDeployment: context.OutputPath /home/site/wwwroot
step.step: <step title="Executing external process" date="2026-03-08T17:01:51.895" type="process" path="bash" arguments="-c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform nodejs --platform-version 20 -p virtualenv_name= --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8de7d34614a50eb -p compress_node_modules=tar-gz | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS ""
